# tsb_team (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Short name of the Team resource.
- `parent` (String) The parent id for the Team resource.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description of the resource.
- `display_name` (String) User friendly name for the resource.
- `exclude_from_jit_reconcile` (Boolean) exclude_from_jit_reconcile, when set to true, makes OIDC JIT group reconciliation never add or remove memberships on this team. Use it for admin-curated teams (for example incident-response, break-glass, or administrator teams) that are governed outside the OIDC flow. Defaults to false.
- `external_members` (List of String) external_members are the team members bound by external group-claim (OIDC JIT) reconciliation, projected from the access graph on read. This field is disjoint from `members`, which remains the manually curated source of truth: a user that is both manually and externally assigned appears only in `members`. Union `members` with `external_members` to get the effective roster. This field is read-only -- it is ignored on create and update, is never persisted, and is excluded from `etag`.
- `members` (List of String) List of members under the team. The elements of this list are the FQNs of the team members. Team members can be users, service accounts or other teams.
- `oidc_groups` (List of String) oidc_groups are the OIDC group-claim values that bind users to this team during just-in-time (JIT) membership reconciliation. Claim values are matched exactly (case-sensitive, no whitespace normalization). This is a flat list; a value from any provider's group claim can match. Has no effect unless OIDC JIT group synchronization is enabled on the management plane.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Fully-qualified name of the Team resource.
- `source_type` (String) Where the team comes from. It can be a local team that exists only in TSB (type LOCAL) or it can be a team that has been synchronized from the Identity Provider (for example: type LDAP). <!-- terraform code generation tags +protoc-gen-terraform:computed -->
